detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TheProtocolDAO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#643-767):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#707)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#781-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#713)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#765)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#909)
	TheProtocolDAO._rOwned (TheProtocolDAO.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheProtocolDAO._takeTeam(uint256) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#921-929)
	- TheProtocolDAO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#881-917)
	- TheProtocolDAO.balanceOf(address) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#469-473)
	- TheProtocolDAO.constructor() (TheProtocolDAO.sol#403-433)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#765)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#935)
	TheProtocolDAO._rTotal (TheProtocolDAO.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheProtocolDAO._getCurrentSupply() (TheProtocolDAO.sol#1077-1087)
	- TheProtocolDAO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#933-939)
	- TheProtocolDAO.constructor() (TheProtocolDAO.sol#403-433)
	- TheProtocolDAO.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TheProtocolDAO.sol#565-587)
